name: Decimal Dino & Friends
description: Learn to count, scale, and round numbers with the helpful Decimal Dino!

name: Arithmetic Champion
description: Solve addition and arithmetic equations to hoist the Arithmetic Trophy!

name: Fraction Feast Master
description: Slice up the conceptual pies and ratios to master fraction additions!

name: Geometry Wizard
description: Wave your math wand to master lines, angles, and triangles!

name: Division Detective
description: Investigate times-tables, prime factors, and detective division cases!

name: Speed Star Racer
description: Hop in a rocket ship and speed through rate, time, and distance problems!

name: Data Treasure Hunter
description: Chart your path across statistical maps to find the hidden probability chest!

name: Algebra Alchemist
description: Mix formulas in your equations beaker to perform math alchemy!

name: Right-Angle Knight
description: Forge the pythagorean shield to defend the angles of your math fortress!

name: Trigonometry King
description: Ascend the throne by charting coordinates and scaling standard trigonometric peaks!
